title: Chapter 24
content:
Chapter 24

Martha argued while moaning heavily, but I dismissed her complaint but simply saying, "This is a new type of massage. It feels good, doesn't it?"

"Yes~~~" Martha moaned in reply but argued, "But that hole is hmm~~ dirty."

I simply smiled and replied, "Don't worry. I cleaned it well. Now you just enjoy."

She didn't argue anymore, or more like she couldn't, because I picked up speed, in and out, forth and back, while also increasing the amount of mana being supplied to my finger, used to enhance the sensitivity of her anal cavity.

"Hng~~!!!" She soon let out a loud moan and came, her pussy letting juices out straight into the bath pool.

I, on the other hand, was once again depressed. Such a cool world, yet I was bound once again. It was painful, but I had already begun to put my plan in motion, and it wouldn't be long before I fixed my useless body to perfection.

I just required a few days. With the plan laid out, if I could raise my level and mana a little bit more, I could easily solve all my problems.

"Haa... Haa..." I dismissed the moaning Martha and pressed the vessels near her brain at the back of her neck.

In an instant, she passed out, and I grabbed her before she could fall headfirst into the bath pool. I pulled her out and laid her down on the cold floor before I dressed her in some of the clothes in my inventory.

Once she was fast asleep, I submerged myself back into the bath pool and just waited for Sandra, who didn't leave me hanging for long. As she entered, she had a bag in her hand in which I could see some vials.

"What are those for?" I asked while I had a good idea what those were for.

"I talked to an alchemist about a magical potion that could restore mana, and he said to bring him some samples," Sandra explained as she began to lose her clothes.

Once she was perfectly naked and ready to have a bath, she entered the bath pool under my watchful gaze and submerged herself into the water just like yesterday. The very same water in which her younger sister had spilled her juices.

As she came out, she pointed at Martha as she rested her back against the pool wall and asked, "Did she pass out again?"

"She did." I replied before I asked, "Shall we begin?"

"Sure." She replied before she opened her mouth and said, "You can begin."

Nice try, and as much as I was tempted by the open invitation, I had other plans for today.

"Why don't you stand up and turn your back on me? I have figured out a better way to climax." I replied. She corked an eyebrow at my suggestion, but regardless, she stood up and turned around.

Once her ass was in view, I slapped it lightly without imbuing any mana and stood behind her.

"Ow." She winced a little, but it wasn't much. She remarked, "How does mother feel good from this? It doesn't feel good at all."

"It doesn't in the beginning." I simply replied instead of lengthening the conversation uselessly.

"I see." She replied but didn't say anything further.

I placed my hand on her back and then her front belly before I began to push her down gently from her back, and brought her to a good forty-five-degree angle.

I hadn't lowered her all the way because there was no need to. She was meaty but not as much as Rayla so just doing that was enough to expose her pussy slit and the hole of desire to me.

Once she was properly exposed to me, I rubbed my finger on her pussy slit, feeling it become moistened in just a few rubs.

And no, it wasn't the moisture from the bath water that was contaminated with our little sister's juices.

She was properly wet and to ascertain that, she...

"Ahhh~~~"

Moaned out but not loud enough, just long enough for me to understand she could feel it, but not come from it. Now it was a woman's nature to not climax before man and if I were to use the natural ways, I wouldn't be able to make her cum so easily so...

"Aaahhnnpp!!!" She suddenly moaned out loud while straightening her back as if something had been shoved into her backside, but it wasn't. Just a little lower than that.

"Aaaaannnhhhhnn~~~~~"

A long moan once again left her mouth as I stimulated her insides with mana. Before activating the state of completion, I wanted to completely accustom her to my penetration. That included making her cum at least once or twice.

The only problem I faced was the intensity. Natural climax wasn't as stimulating, so women wouldn't pass out, but if I were to use mana to enhance that stimulation, it would also stimulate their nerves directly linked to the brain, which would cause them to pass out as well.

So to make sure that didn't happen, I grabbed her throat and applied mana to it, lowering the intensity felt by her brain. Ultimately, if I wanted her to cum, her brain needed to be stimulated because that was how one felt pleasure but if I lowered that a little, I would achieve my objective a little slowly but at least she wouldn't pass out.

Why didn't I just lower my mana supply? Well, I couldn't. I couldn't supply mana less than one point, it was her body that couldn't hold that even single point of mana.

The mana of this world was very... thin. It was so thin that if I had 1000 points of mana, it would be equivalent to 10,000 points of mana possessed by someone else.

It was either that the mana entering their bodies was too thin or simply because their cultivation techniques were too low in rank. Well, it was a problem for later. For now, I had finally...

"AAHHHHGGGG!!!"

She tightened and straightened herself even more to the point my hand was at the threat of being crushed cushioned between her ass. Not a bad way to lose my hand.

Anyway, she came tremendously. But that wasn't enough for me. I wanted more. However, just before I could...

"What is it?!" The door opened, and someone barged in with great urgency. It was none other than Julian. When he saw my hand in Sandra's pussy, he understood and let out a sigh.

But on the contrary, that only made me angry.

Why?

Because I had left this part out. There were no locks in this house, not even on the front door, and there weren't in any house on this street. Since that was the case, anyone could enter anywhere, and if they were to enter when I'd be balls deep in Sandra, the fact that I had a 'tail' would be revealed to everyone, and at the moment, I couldn't quite trust Lucas, the elder brother of Jack.

So, as angry as I was, I decided to let go of this session and think about this for a bit longer.

"Don't worry, Father. She's just feeling good." I replied while suppressing my anger, the best I could.

"Oh, I see." That was all he had to say after interrupting my fun time.

"Haa..." I couldn't help but sigh. I was partly at fault as well. In my lust, I had forgotten about the simplest of things, such as creating a mana bubble around me so the voice wouldn't leak out, or locking the door, or things like that.

Mana bubble was a little difficult to create at the moment for me, given that my mana wasn't sufficient. Still, I calmed down and lowered my breathing. It wasn't time to act out yet.

"How about I take them to their room now?" I said before I picked the limp but conscious Sandra and the unconscious Martha up on my shoulders to take them to their rooms.

Since I was a little bummed out once again, I decided to cheer myself up with some activities of the night.

And no, I wasn't talking about some dick actions. There was still time before everyone went to bed, so I had something else to do.

It was what every city had, and no doubt this one had as well, even in the commoner district.

I was going to visit the nightlife of this city and...

And... simply kill.
